nasb.text: See, I have placed the land before you; go in and possess the land which the Lord swore to give to your fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, to them and their descendants after them.’

esv.text: See, I have set the land before you. Go in and take possession of the land that the Lord swore to your fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, to give to them and to their offspring after them.’

cnv.text: 看哪，我把這地擺在你面前，你們要進去，佔領這地為業，就是耶和華向你們列祖亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各起誓應許給他們和他們的後裔的地。’

ccb.text: 看啊，我把那片土地赐给你们了，你们去占领吧，那是耶和华起誓赐给你们祖先亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各和他们后裔的地方。’
